CONTENT.Club career: Born to Paraguayan parents in Wanda, in the Argentine province of Misiones, Arzamendia moved to Paraguay at age 13 and joined Cerro Porteño after passing the try outs. He made his debut as a senior for them during the 2015 campaign.On 8 July 2021, Arzamendia signed a four-year contract with La Liga side Cádiz CF. On 7 July 2023, he renewed his contract until 2026, being loaned back to his former club Cerro for a year.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 24 April 2024As of match played 24 April 2024
CONTENT.International career: Eligible to play for Argentina or Paraguay, Arzamendia chose the latter in late September 2018. He made his debut for the Paraguay on 26 March 2019 in a friendly against Mexico, as a starter.

SUMMARY: Santiago Arzamendia Duarte (born 5 May 1998) is professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Spanish club Cádiz. Born in Argentina, he plays for the Paraguay national team.
